title: 3M-CPSEED：An EEG-based Dataset for Chinese Pinyin Production in Overt, Silent-intended, and Imagined Speech
description: 3M-CPSEED is an EEG dataset comprising recordings from 20 native Chinese speakers performing Chinese Pinyin production tasks across three modalities: overt speech, silent articulation, and imagined speech. The dataset captures neural activity during articulation of selected Pinyin initials and finals, enabling investigation of speech neurophysiology and cross-linguistic transfer learning applications.
methods_description: EEG recordings were obtained from 20 healthy, right-handed participants (mean age 24.55 years, 11 females) during Pinyin production tasks. Participants read Pinyin stimuli displayed on screen under three conditions: overt speech, silent articulation, and imagined speech. The stimulus set comprised 4 finals (a, i, u, ü) and 6 initials (m, f, j, l, k, ch). Each participant completed 4 blocks totaling 1600 trials.
